unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You don't have access to this page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: DentEase PH processes personal and health-related data in line with applicable Philippines data privacy laws (including the Data Privacy Act). This page is a summary placeholder; your clinic should publish a jurisdiction-specific policy before production use.
privacy.bullet1: Data is used to run appointments, billing, and notifications you configure.
privacy.bullet2: Access is restricted to authenticated staff of your clinic.
privacy.bullet3: Contact your clinic administrator for access, correction, or deletion requests.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms are a non-binding placeholder for the DentEase PH software service. Replace with counsel-reviewed terms covering subscriptions, liability, acceptable use, and governing law (Philippines) before commercial launch.

marketingShell.footerTagline: DentEase -- clinic operations, billing, and patient experience in one place.

about.title: About DentEase
about.subtitle: Software shaped around real dental clinics in the Philippines and beyond.
about.lead: We built DentEase so owners, dentists, and front-desk teams can share one source of truth -- from the first call to the final payment.
about.missionBody: Reduce administrative drag and clinical risk with a modern, DPA-aware platform that respects how clinics actually work: busy mornings, walk-ins, HMO paperwork, and patients who expect GCash-ready payments.
about.pillar1Body: Queues, appointments, inventory, and billing stay connected so nothing falls between spreadsheets.
about.pillar2Body: PhilHealth fields, HMO flows, OR-friendly invoices, and SMS reminders tuned for Philippine numbers.
about.pillar3Body: Large touch targets, tablet-first odontogram, and English  -  Filipino  -  Turkish staff UI.
about.trustBody: Role-based access, audit-friendly flows, and privacy summaries you can extend with your legal counsel before production.
about.ctaBody: Start from the staff login, explore demo data, or send us a detailed request from the contact page.

faqPublic.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPublic.subtitle: Same helpful answers as on the home page -- bookmarkable for your team.

contact.title: Contact & quote request
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your clinic. We respond to demo and partnership inquiries on a best-effort basis during beta.
contact.privacyCheck: I agree to be contacted about DentEase and I have read the privacy summary.
contact.successBody: Thank you. We will review your message and reply by email when capacity allows.
contact.errorRequired: Please fill required fields and accept the privacy notice.
contact.finePrint: This form is not a binding contract. For legal agreements, your counsel should review terms and DPA documentation.

pricingFull.title: Plans & pricing
pricingFull.subtitle: Transparent tiers designed around clinic size. Final commercial pricing may change before GA.
pricingFull.afterCardsBody: Multi-branch groups, training days, or on-premise discussions -- send us context via the contact form.

cookies.title: Cookies & similar technologies
cookies.intro: This notice explains how DentEase marketing and app surfaces may use cookies or local storage on your device.
cookies.s1Body: Authentication tokens, language preference, and theme choice are stored locally so the product works after refresh.
cookies.s2Body: We may enable privacy-preserving analytics later. You will be informed before non-essential trackers are introduced.
cookies.s3Body: You can clear site data from your browser settings at any time. Staff accounts require cookies or equivalent storage for secure sessions.

patients.searchHint: Matches name, phone, and PhilHealth fields from the server index.
patients.loadFailedHint: Check that the backend is running, PostgreSQL is reachable (DATABASE_URL), and the frontend VITE_API_URL matches the API base URL (same host, port, and /api suffix as in backend/.env PORT and API_PREFIX).

reports.title: Reports center
reports.subtitle: Role-aware financial and operational intelligence. All figures respect clinic isolation, Asia/Manila dating, and staff permissions.
reports.statScopeBody: Every export and table is filtered to your signed-in clinic.
reports.statTzBody: Buckets, PDF periods, and SMS windows align to PH business time.
reports.statAccessBody: Sensitive ledgers stay behind ADMIN / finance paths as the API evolves.
reports.cardArDesc: Drill into outstanding balances by aging bucket, patient, and OR reference. Built for follow-up calls and finance reviews.
reports.cardArBullet3: Optimized for wide tablets and desktops
reports.cardDashDesc: Revenue trend, appointment mix, patient queue, pending HMO, and monthly board pack PDF.
reports.cardDashBullet2: Monthly PDF tied to selectable year/month
reports.cardDashBullet3: Queue actions where your role allows
reports.cardPhicDesc: Analyze e-claim submission success, pending reimbursements, and payment turnaround times.
reports.cardHmoDesc: Track which insurance providers drive your business. Compare Maxicare, Medicard, and others.
reports.pipelineBody: These modules will surface here as first-class report tiles -- same responsive shell, export parity, and audit-friendly logs.
reports.pipelineLi1: CSV / Excel packs for finance closes
reports.footerLead: Monthly PDF: use the year/month controls on the dashboard, then download when totals look correct.
reports.footerTrail: Need a custom cut? Track requirements in your clinic playbook -- API hooks already follow invoice and appointment IDs for traceability.
